steps.note: Phase 1: mint mike (ryan) then the fork mike_2 (amy) — same as f12 phases 1-2.

steps.say: Hello there, how is it going?
The name is Mike. Spelled M, I, K, E.
Hi Timmy, nice to meet you.
The name is Mike. Spelled M, I, K, E.

steps.note: Phase 2: mike_2's OWNER says 'enroll me as Mike' again. Sibling check must AUGMENT mike_2 (journal: sibling_augment:mike_2), never mint mike_3.

steps.expect: [COMMIT] augments mike_2 — journal 'sibling_augment:mike_2'; NO mike_3 anywhere

steps.note: Phase 3: no eternal self-protest — mike_2's owner claiming their display name is a no-op for the correction detector.

steps.say: My name is Mike, just so you know.
steps.expect: NO misID confirm latch (detector no-op via display base); ordinary LLM reply
